violations.text: Firm is not: 1) calibrating thermometer and recording it in a calibration log in accordance with their HACCP plan. 2) Weekly review is not observed temperature logs. Calibratioon Log. corrected. By 09/09/2025 New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The walk-in cooler in the production area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment was not storing time/temperature control for safety foods at time of inspection. Firm must repair/replace/adjust walk-in cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
